title: Ancient Rocks Reveal Evidence Of The First Continents And Crust Recycling Processes On Earth
description: New research led by scientists at the University of Wisconsin–Madison has uncovered chemical signatures in zircons, the planet’s oldest minerals, that are consistent with subduction and extensive continental crust during the Hadean Eon, more than 4 billion years ago.
